/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread -shared -Wl,-soname,libbondcpp.so -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/bondcpp/lib/libbondcpp.so CMakeFiles/bondcpp.dir/src/timeout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bondcpp.dir/src/bond.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bondcpp.dir/src/BondSM_sm.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/melodic/lib: -luuid /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp.so -lboost_filesystem /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
